changelog:
v1.3.2 - Full Feature Release

- Programmer - interactive HTML/CSS/JS learning IDE with AI tutor
- Agent Driven Environment - device control & automation with scroll, go back, deep link
- General Chat rewrite - voice input, image gen, file attachments, NVIDIA vision
- Image save/share with Ambot AI branded watermark
- 50+ crash fixes from comprehensive codebase audit

v1.2.0 - Social Links & Landing Page Polish

- Added Facebook and Instagram social links to landing page footer
- Developer: Christian Keth Aguacito

v1.1.0 - Smart Error Handling & User Guide

- Download counter (private, token-protected stats endpoint)
- Clear instructions when offline with no model - tells you to go online or download a model
- Improved Model Required dialog explains both paths: Cloud AI (built-in NVIDIA keys) or Local Model (offline)
- Settings "HOW IT WORKS" guide explaining Cloud AI vs Local AI modes
- Better error messages in Chat when cloud AI is unreachable
- Better error messages in Image Generation when offline or API fails
- General Chat now detects offline+no-model and shows actionable options before attempting

v1.0.2 - First Release Build

- Release variant APK (minified, shrunk, signed)
- Smaller download size compared to debug builds
- All v1.0.1 features included

v1.0.1 - UI Polish & Auto-Update

- Redesigned General Chat input bar
- Redesigned Image Generation input bar
- Cleaner Image Generation gallery
- Cleaner Drawer header
- Auto-update check on app launch
